title: Add Phoenix.Ecto.SQL.Sandbox plug to endpoint at the top
prompt: Write a complete `lib/my_app_web/endpoint.ex` module that starts with (before ANY other plug) a conditional `if Application.compile_env(:my_app, :sql_sandbox, false), do: plug(Phoenix.Ecto.SQL.Sandbox)` block. Follow with basic session options, socket, and router plugs. Placement order is the whole point of the challenge.
tier_rationale: Single-file module writing. The tricky part is placement — this challenge discriminates placement heuristically via pattern ordering.
research_citation: "It's important that this is at the top of `endpoint.ex`, before any other plugs." — Phoenix.Ecto.SQL.Sandbox docs
